Letra/Lyrics for "Gente de Zona - La Gozadera"

Miami me lo confirmó
Gente de Zona
Puerto Rico me lo regaló
Marc Anthony
Dominicana ya repicó
Yelelei yelelei ohh
Y del Caribe somos tú y yo (Ponle)

Y se formó la gozadera, Miami me lo confirmó (¿Qué me confirmó?)
Y el arroz con habichuela, Puerto Rico me lo regaló
Y la tambora merenguera, Dominicana ya repicó
Con México, Colombia y Venezuela
Y del Caribe somos tú y yo

Repicando
La cosa está bien dura, la cosa está divina
Perú con Honduras, Chile con Argentina
Panamá trae la zandunga, Ecuador bilirrubina
Y Uruguay con Paraguay, hermano con Costa Rica
Bolivia viene llegando, Brasil ya está en camino
El mundo se está sumando, a la fiesta de los latinos (Ponle)

Y se formó la gozadera, Miami me lo confirmó
Y el arroz con habichuela, Puerto Rico me lo regaló
Y la tambora merenguera, Dominicana ya repicó
Con México, Colombia y Venezuela
Y del Caribe somos tú y yo

Y se formó la gozadera, Miami me lo confirmó
Ay el arroz con habichuela, Puerto Rico me lo regaló
Y la tambora merenguera, Dominicana ya repicó
Con México, Colombia y Venezuela
Y del Caribe somos tú y yo

(Marc Anthony)
Vamos Guatemala, la fiesta te espera
Llama a Nicaragua, El Salvador se cuela
Yo canto desde Cuba y el mundo se entera
Si tú eres Latino, saca tu bandera

Ponle
Y se formó la gozadera, Miami me lo confirmó
Y el arroz con habichuela, Puerto Rico me lo regaló (¿Qué es la que hay, papá?)
Y la tambora merenguera, Dominicana ya repicó
Con México, Colombia y Venezuela
Y del Caribe somos tú y yo

Y se formó la gozadera, Miami me lo confirmó
Ay el arroz con habichuela, Puerto Rico me lo regaló (Boricua)
Y la tambora merenguera, Dominicana ya repicó
Con México, Colombia y Venezuela
Y del Caribe somos tú y yo

Pa' los parceros y las parceras, vamos
¿Qué la que hay papá?
Ahora sí, nadie nos baja de aquí
Ponle ahí, cuchi cui
Gustoso y mira cómo gozo (Botin)
Yo te lo dije
Gente de Zona
Tú sabes
Lo mejor que suena hoy

snippet.title: SCARY MOVIE | Trailer Ufficiale
snippet.description:
Ventisei anni dopo essere sfuggiti a un killer mascherato fin troppo familiare (“Ghostface”), i Core Four tornano nel mirino dell’assassino — e nessun franchise horror è al sicuro.
Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”) e Regina Hall (“Brenda”) si riuniscono in Scary Movie insieme a volti amatissimi di ritorno e nuove facce pronte a fare a pezzi reboot, remake, requel, prequel, sequel, spin-off, elevated horror, origin story, qualsiasi cosa contenga la parola “legacy” e ogni “capitolo finale” che finale non è mai.

Niente è sacro. Nessun cliché sopravvive. Ogni limite viene superato.

I Wayans sono tornati per cancellare la Cancel Culture.

🎤 Song Lyrics: Lewis Capaldi - Someone You Loved

[Verse 1]
I'm going under and this time I fear there's no one to save me
This all or nothing really got a way of driving me crazy
I need somebody to heal
Somebody to know
Somebody to have
Somebody to hold
It's easy to say
But it's never the same
I guess I kinda liked the way you numbed all the pain

[Chorus]
Now the day bleeds
Into nightfall
And you're not here
To get me through it all
I let my guard down
And then you pulled the rug
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved

[Verse 2]
I'm going under and this time I fear there's no one to turn to
This all or nothing way of loving got me sleeping without you
Now, I need somebody to know
Somebody to heal
Somebody to have
Just to know how it feels
It's easy to say but it's never the same
I guess I kinda liked the way you helped me escape

[Chorus]
Now the day bleeds
Into nightfall
And you're not here
To get me through it all
I let my guard down
And then you pulled the rug
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved

[Bridge]
And I tend to close my eyes when it hurts sometimes
I fall into your arms
I'll be safe in your sound 'til I come back around

[Chorus]
For now the day bleeds
Into nightfall
And you're not here

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Gold AG x Motrat Mustafa - BABË E NANË
snippet.description:
ONIMA - http://smarturl.it/ONIMA

Gold AG x Motrat Mustafa - BABË E NANË

Teksti: Gold AG
Muzika: Kreshnik Avdiu
Orkestrimi: Labinot Mezini
Video: MProduction

BABË E NANË

Safetja:
A je mire o shpirti nanes
A m’je lodhe bre a je gjalle
Mos e ki naj dit’ pushim
N’shpijen tonde pak me ardhe.
 
Ata nipa ato mbesa
A po rriten a po msojne
A po folni shqip te shpia
Gjuhen ton’ mos ta harrojme.
 
Sahidja:
Ah moj nana jem e mira
Ma e mira e ksaj bote
Buka e gurbetit nan
Jo s’koka si buka jote.
 
E tash kur po ja ni eren
Ah moj nan’ evladit tem
Tash pe di se sa t’mungoj
Ah moj nan’ e shtrejta jem.

Ref 2x:
Bota flen e ndriçon hana
Per evladin çut rrin nana
Boten krejt nese e blene
Babe e nane kerkun nuk gjene.

Goldi:
Ah ti me dit oj nan’ mu kjo zemer sa m’kan’
Vallahi nuk jom hiq mire po mire duna me than’
Na qe jem larg venit ni shprehje krejt e kem
Ktu jon tona t’mirat veç babe e nan nuk gjen’
Pune e njejt si çdo here çohesh n’terr e kthehesh n’terr
Me bo pare per pleqni e ma n’fund asnjo spe mer
Zori kas po tqojke sikur mu qe m’pruni sot
Bleje jastekun e shtrejte e ate jastek laje me lot
Buk’ e krip e zemer qashtu ju m’rritet
Erdha per ma mir e si n’burg pi numroj ditet
Ni cop’ buke te na ta jep kushdo qe e thirr’
A k’tu nese ski pare per 1 cent s’ta lojne ma lire
Fmija tash po rriten, shpejt po kalojn kto vite
A shkojna te shpia bab gjyshja na qet pite
Ni dit’ m’veti qika s’kisha ni pytje ma t’rone
Masi duhet me dasht prindin bab  pse n’Kosove ti i ke lone ???

Safetja:
Pasuni shume te madhe
Na ka dhan ai dheu i huj’
Po çka mduhet mu shtepia
Pa e ni zanin e juj’.
 
Me i pas’ paret e dunjas
Prap po kishe derte, halle
Era e evladit koka
Pasunia ma e madhe.
 
Sahidja:
Pike e pese moj nan gurbeti
A pe sheh qysh na ka ba
Nuk e di kshtu çka na gjeti
Me u kon gjalle , mos me u pa.
 
Çdo dit’ folim n’telefon
Asni dit nuk shkon pa t’thirre
E kur t’pys qysh je oj nan’
Ti gjithmone thu shume jam mire.

Ref 2x:
Bota flen e ndriçon hana
Per evladin çut rrin nana
Boten krejt nese e blene
Babe e nane kerkun nuk gjene.





Connect with Gold AG
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/gold.ag
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/arianagushi/


#GoldAG #BabeENane #ONIMA
